prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains specifically to Look Ahead Care and Support Limited, which operates in London and the South East of England. The regulatory framework described and the entities involved do not extend to Scotland, as housing regulation is managed separately in Scotland under its own legislative framework.
